name: Noel Nanaimo Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the golden crisco shortening, granulated sugar, cocoa, vanilla, and beaten egg over low heat, stirring constantly until the mixture begins to thicken. Remove from heat.
2. Stir in the coconut flakes, graham wafer crumbs, and chopped walnuts.
3. Press firmly into a greased 9 x 9-inch (2.5 L) square cake pan. Chill for at least half an hour.
Filling:
1. In a small bowl, cream the golden crisco shortening, custard powder, and milk until blended. Beat on high speed of an electric mixer until light and creamy.
2. Spread over the first layer in the pan. Chill until firm.
Top:
1. Heat the semi-sweet chocolate and golden crisco shortening until smoothly melted.
2. Quickly spread the chocolate evenly over the filling. Chill until firm.
3. Cut into bars. Makes about 30 bars. Freezing: If the chocolate becomes too firm, reheat on low.
